en_title: Life is Strange Creator Don't Nod Warned It Will Run Out of Funds This Year
cn_title: 《奇异人生》开发商Don't Nod资金年内耗尽
subtitle: 只剩五个月
opus_summary: Don't Nod审计报告指出，若无新资金，公司现金将于2026年11月耗尽。腾讯作为主要股东不愿再提供短期资金。公司探索外部投资、提前发布新游戏或承接外包，但尚未找到解决方案。

paragraphs.en: French developer Don't Nod will run out of cash this November, unless a new funding source is found.
paragraphs.cn: 法国开发商Don't Nod将在今年11月耗尽所有现金，除非找到新的资金来源。

paragraphs.en: That's according to a financial report by auditors for the firm published this month, which highlighted the dire straits the studio now finds itself in.
paragraphs.cn: 这一情况来自本月公司审计师发布的一份财务报告，其中重点指出了这家工作室目前所处的困境。

paragraphs.en: Headquarted in Paris with a satellite studio in Montreal, Don't Nod is best known for creating the narrative adventure game series Life is Strange, though more recent entries have been made elsewhere. A spiritual successor, Lost Records: Bloom & Rage, finally emerged in February 2025 but underperformed.
paragraphs.cn: Don't Nod总部位于巴黎，并在蒙特利尔设有一间卫星工作室。该工作室以打造叙事冒险游戏系列《奇异人生》而闻名，不过该系列的较新作已交由其他工作室开发。其精神续作《失落的记录：绽放与愤怒》(Lost Records: Bloom & Rage)终于在2025年2月问世，但市场表现不佳。

paragraphs.en: The company has been searching for a hit in recent years, amid a string of releases that have failed to set tills ringing, including Harmony: The Fall of Reverie, Jusant, Banishers: Ghosts of New Eden, and this year's sci-fi action adventure Aphelion.
paragraphs.cn: 该公司近年一直在寻求一款爆款作品，但其连续推出的一系列游戏都未能掀起市场波澜，包括《和鸣：遐想陨落》(Harmony: The Fall of Reverie)、《Jusant》、《驱灵者：新伊甸幽灵》(驱灵者：新伊甸的幽灵)，以及今年推出的科幻动作冒险游戏《Aphelion》。

paragraphs.en: Now, Don't Nod has been warned it has five months of capital remaining — unless further investment is located imminently. The company is part-owned by Tencent, though auditors have revealed that the Chinese conglomerate is no longer interested in providing further short-term funds.
paragraphs.cn: 而现在，Don't Nod已被警告剩余资金仅够维持五个月——除非立即找到新的投资。腾讯是公司的部分持股方，但审计师透露，这家中国企业集团已不再有意提供进一步的短期资金。

paragraphs.en: "Your chairman has informed us that he has been seeking additional financing for several months and that all avenues are being explored to improve the company's cash position, whether through a capital increase or external financing for your game currently in development," auditors wrote.
paragraphs.cn: 「贵公司董事长已告知我们，他数月来一直在寻求额外融资，并正探索一切途径以改善公司的现金状况，无论是通过增资还是为目前正在开发的游戏寻求外部融资。」审计师写道。

paragraphs.en: "The company management informed us that, according to its cash flow forecasts, without additional financing and taking into account, among other things, revenue assumptions related to the marketing of a new game at the end of April 2026 [Aphelion] and cost savings that have not yet materialized, the company is expected to run out of cash during November 2026.
paragraphs.cn: 「公司管理层告知我们，根据其现金流预测，如果不获得额外融资，并且考虑到一些尚未实现的成本削减，以及预计在2026年4月底推出的一款新游戏《Aphelion》所带来的收入，公司预计将在2026年11月面临现金耗尽。」

paragraphs.en: "Your chairman also informed us that, following his requests, your main shareholder, Tencent, does not wish to subscribe to a capital increase in the short term nor contribute to the financing of games currently in development through co-production agreements.
paragraphs.cn: 「董事长还告知我们，应他要求，公司主要股东腾讯不愿在短期内参与增资，也不愿通过联合制作协议为当前在研游戏提供资金。」

paragraphs.en: "Finally, your Chairman indicated that discussions have been underway with some major players in the video game industry for several months, but that these discussions have not resulted in any structured financing offers. Given the situation, we have determined that the aforementioned facts are likely to jeopardize the continued operation of your company."
paragraphs.cn: 「最后，董事长表示，已与视频游戏行业的一些主要参与者进行了数月的讨论，但这些讨论并未带来任何结构化的融资方案。鉴于目前的情况，我们认定上述事实可能危及贵公司的持续经营。」

paragraphs.en: Solutions currently being explored include funding from another major partner, launching the studio's unannounced next game sooner (earlier in 2027 than planned), or assigning staff to work-for-hire subcontracting work on external projects. As yet, however, no solution has been found.
paragraphs.cn: 目前正在探索的解决方案包括从另一家主要合作伙伴处获取资金、提前发布工作室尚未公布的下一款游戏（比原计划提前至2027年初），或安排员工承接外部项目的雇佣制外包工作。然而，至今尚未找到任何解决方案。

paragraphs.en: It's currently a bleak time for the video game industry, with widespread layoffs and likely studio closures currently under discussion at a raft of studios owned by Microsoft .
paragraphs.cn: 眼下对于视频游戏行业来说是一个黯淡的时期，微软旗下众多工作室正在讨论大规模裁员和可能关闭工作室的议题。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
